title: Multi-Brand Gift Cards

narrative: The user seeks to understand the differences, advantages, and practical details of multi-brand gift card systems, particularly UpCadhoc and Galeries Lafayette, to determine which is more suitable for employee rewards, customer loyalty, or personal gifting. Relevance is determined by information on brand coverage, validity periods, redemption rules (e.g., cumulative use, online/in-store acceptance), fiscal benefits, and user experience. Documents that compare or detail these aspects are relevant; generic promotional content without operational specifics is not.

title: Lamb Tajine Recipe
description: What is a balanced, flavorful lamb tajine recipe with adjusted spice and vegetable quantities to avoid overpowering taste and excess portions?
narrative: The user seeks a reliable lamb tajine recipe that incorporates user-reported modifications to improve balance and practicality—specifically, reduced spice levels (e.g., using teaspoons instead of tablespoons, minimal chili), halved vegetable quantities (aubergine and courgette), and proper meat-to-vegetable ratios. Relevance is determined by recipes that explicitly reference these adjustments from user reviews, avoid overly intense seasoning, and maintain authentic North African flavors while being family-sized and palatable for those sensitive to spice or portion size.

title: Lotus Elise Used
description: Find reliable used Lotus Elise models from the late 1990s to early 2000s with low mileage and documented service history.
narrative: The user is seeking a used Lotus Elise, specifically from the original 1998–2004 generation, prioritizing vehicles with verified maintenance records, low odometer readings, and no accident history. They are a car enthusiast looking for an affordable, lightweight sports car with authentic driving dynamics, and they want to avoid scams or odometer fraud. Relevance is determined by listings that include detailed service logs, original parts, and a clean Histovec or equivalent vehicle history report. Newer models or heavily modified versions are irrelevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes
description: What are traditional and modern recipes for veal paupiettes, including preparation tips and cultural background?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on veal paupiettes, including authentic French recipes, variations (e.g., with pesto, mushrooms, or wine), cooking techniques to avoid drying out the meat, and historical context such as regional names and origins. Relevance is determined by content that provides step-by-step recipes, expert tips for successful preparation, and cultural or historical insights—not just ingredient lists or unrelated cooking advice.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What are the most effective and legally compliant options for protecting passengers, especially children, from UV rays and heat while driving?
narrative: The user seeks practical solutions to shield car occupants—particularly infants—from harmful UV exposure and excessive heat during travel. They prioritize products that are both effective (blocking 99% of UV rays, reducing interior heat) and legally compliant (e.g., maintaining at least 70% visible light transmission on front windows). Relevance is determined by whether the solution addresses safety, legality, ease of installation, and child-specific protection, such as rear-window sun visors or tinted films that do not impair driver visibility.

title: Petit Bateau Stores

title: Renault Employee Car Deal

title: Military Education

narrative: The user seeks to understand the evolving intellectual framework of the French School of War, particularly its emphasis on reflective, democratic, and globally engaged military education rather than purely tactical training. The user is interested in how the institution bridges military tradition with contemporary civilian-military dialogue, and thus, documents that highlight philosophical reflections, published works, and institutional mission statements are relevant—while technical manuals or purely administrative pages (e.g., cookie policies) are not.

title: Unemployment Benefits Option
description: How can a re-employed unemployed person choose between resuming old unemployment benefits or claiming new benefits based on recent work, and what are the eligibility criteria for each option?
narrative: The user is a job seeker who has previously received unemployment benefits, returned to work, and is now unemployed again. They want to understand whether they should resume their remaining old unemployment allowances or exercise their right of option to receive a new allowance based on their recent employment. Relevance depends on accurate details about eligibility thresholds (e.g., 122 days or 610 hours of work since last claim), daily allowance comparisons (minimum 30% increase or not exceeding €20/day difference), and procedural requirements (21-day decision window). The user needs clear, authoritative guidance on which option maximizes their financial benefit and how to formally select it.

title: AXA Client Access
description: How can AXA customers in France securely access their insurance and banking client spaces online?
narrative: The user is an AXA policyholder in metropolitan France seeking clear, official guidance on logging into their personal client area for insurance services, and understanding the distinction between the insurance portal (axa.fr) and the separate banking portal (axabanque.fr). Relevance is determined by content that provides step-by-step login instructions, official web addresses, password recovery options, and explicit warnings about fraudulent sites. title: Electric Car Incentives
description: What financial incentives and subsidies are available for purchasing new or used electric vehicles in France, and how do they compare to the higher upfront costs?
narrative: The user is considering purchasing an electric vehicle in France and wants to understand the full financial picture, including government bonuses (ecological and conversion), regional aids, tax exemptions, and incentives for used or retrofitted vehicles. Relevance is determined by documents that detail specific monetary amounts, eligibility criteria (e.g., income thresholds, vehicle age, CO2 limits), timeframes for aid, and comparisons between electric and thermal vehicle costs. title: Potato Disease Control
description: What are effective, eco-friendly methods to prevent and treat common potato diseases like late blight and common scab, and how can crop management reduce pest infestations such as the Colorado beetle?
narrative: The user seeks practical, sustainable solutions for managing potato crop diseases and pests, prioritizing non-chemical or low-toxicity approaches such as bicarbonate sprays, crop rotation, and trap cropping. Relevant materials must detail preventive strategies, treatment protocols (e.g., baking soda solutions for late blight), soil management techniques, and resistant varieties. Information on biological controls or organic remedies is preferred over synthetic pesticides. Documents must directly link methods to specific diseases or pests and explain their efficacy and application.

narrative: The user seeks precise conjugation patterns for the French verb 'prévaloir' (to prevail), particularly in indicative present and compound past tenses, and wants to understand its grammatical behavior in relation to other verbs like 'alléguer'—including accent rules, auxiliary usage, and syntactic nuances. Relevance is determined by accurate conjugation tables, clear distinctions in verb group classification (e.g., third group), and comparative analysis of usage or orthographic rules such as accent placement.

narrative: The user seeks information about the French television program 'Rendez-vous en terre inconnu,' which transports celebrities to isolated communities globally, where they encounter indigenous peoples and immerse themselves in their traditions. title: Diarrhea Diet
description: What foods and beverages are recommended to consume during diarrhea to aid recovery and avoid worsening symptoms?
narrative: The user is seeking dietary guidance for managing diarrhea, focusing on foods that soothe the digestive system and reduce transit speed. Relevant products include cooked potatoes (like the Black Truffle Potato Crush, though its truffle flavor may be too strong), steamed or boiled potatoes without added fats, cooked vegetables like carrots and zucchini, lean proteins such as poached eggs or white fish, and low-fiber fruits like baked apples or bananas. The user wants to avoid raw foods, high-fiber items, dairy (except firm cheeses), fatty preparations, sugary drinks, and legumes. Relevance is determined by alignment with expert dietary advice from the Health Magazine article, prioritizing low-fiber, easily digestible, cooked foods that help restore hydration and electrolyte balance without stimulating bowel movement.

title: Green Electricity Switch
description: What are the best non-binding, cost-effective electricity suppliers in France that offer customizable green energy options with transparent pricing and local production?
narrative: The user is looking to switch from a traditional electricity provider to a supplier that offers 100% renewable energy with no long-term commitment, clear pricing, and no hidden fees. Relevance is determined by suppliers that guarantee lower prices than regulated tariffs, provide detailed breakdowns of energy origin through Guarantees of Origin certificates, offer flexible billing (e.g., smoothed or actual consumption), and enable customization of green energy percentages — as demonstrated by Alpiq’s options. title: Kia Plug-in Hybrids
description: What are the latest Kia plug-in hybrid models available, their electric range, pricing, and eligibility for government incentives?

title: Gallic Ancestors

description: What is Beaujolais nouveau, and how does it differ from other Beaujolais wines in terms of production, taste, and cultural significance?

title: Boat Shoes

title: APRE Assistance
description: What financial support is available to RSA beneficiaries for overcoming barriers to re-entering employment, and how does eligibility vary by department?
narrative: The user is a recipient of RSA (Revenu de Solidarité Active) who has secured a job or training opportunity but faces financial obstacles such as transportation, childcare, professional clothing, or equipment costs.
